name: Ivan Tchernyakhovski
longDesc: Ivan Tchernyakhovski, plus jeune commandant de Front soviétique, dirige le 3e Front biélorusse lors de l'opération Bagration avant d'être tué en Prusse orientale en février 1945. En WC4, carte blindée tier-S or : excellent choix offensif pour Bagration.

skills.name: Blasting Impact
skills.desc: After commanding an armored unit to annihilate an enemy troop, deal an additional 25% damage to enemies around the target.

skills.name: Inspiration
skills.desc: 30% chance to boost morale after attacking. Damage +12% when morale is high

skills.name: Panzer Leader
skills.desc: 32% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding armored units

skills.name: Blitzkrieg
skills.desc: 36% chance that the enemy will not fight back when commanding armored units

skills.name: Armored Assault
skills.desc: Deal +18% damage to the enemy when commanding armored units

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Ivan Chernyakhovsky, the youngest Soviet Front commander, led the 3rd Belorussian Front through Operation Bagration before being killed in East Prussia in February 1945. In WC4 a tier-S gold armor card — an excellent offensive choice for the Bagration scenario.
longDescDe: Iwan Tschernjachowski, der jüngste Frontbefehlshaber der Roten Armee, führte bei Bagration die 3. Weißrussische Front und fiel im Februar 1945 in Ostpreußen. Im WC4 eine S-Klasse-Gold-Panzerkarte — eine exzellente Offensivwahl für das Bagration-Szenario.
